discovery_status.reason: ESPN has unlimited free access, API-Football has plan restrictions

current_recent_form.reason: ESPN has historical access, API-Football limited to current 3 days on free tier

h2h_head_to_head.reason: Both support H2H with proper cutoff/exclusion

standings_competition_context.reason: ESPN and football-data.org both provide standings

fixture_team_statistics.reason: Both provide complete stats including corners

cross_provider_identity.reason: Crosswalk maps ESPN and API-Football IDs

lineups.reason: API-Football has more reliable lineup data

expected_goals.competition_restriction: EPL, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, RFPL only

notes: All P0 capabilities have at least one verified production route. ESPN is the primary for most capabilities due to unlimited free access and historical data availability.
